'''V-Haad''' was a tall, balding [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], one of two [[Hospitality Guide]]s who introduced [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kegan/Legends|Kegan]]. His female counterpart was [[O-Rina]].

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Fight for Truth]]'' {{1st}}
